description: This issue was addressed by restricting options offered on a locked device. This issue is fixed in watchOS 10.6, macOS Sonoma 14.6, iOS 17.6 and iPadOS 17.6, iOS 16.7.9 and iPadOS 16.7.9. An attacker with physical access to a device may be able to access contacts from the lock screen.
